tool_args.label: LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD & METRO-NORTH RAILROAD KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS

payload.title: LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD & METRO-NORTH RAILROAD KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS
payload.description: Key performance metrics document prepared for the February 2025 meeting of the Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committees

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Metro-North Railroad
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North Railroad is comprised of nearly 6,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 124 stations, nearly 900 miles of track, and 19 shops and yards.

issues: evidence_refs must include at least one source block

issues: evidence_refs must include at least one source block

tool_args.label: Penn Station Access
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Construction & Development continues to progress the Penn Station Access project, which will extend Metro-North New Haven Line service into Penn Station.

payload.description: MTA Construction & Development continues to progress the Penn Station Access project, which will extend Metro-North New Haven Line service into Penn Station.

warnings: project.lead_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Lead agency is relation context. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: South Street and Fulton Avenue Bridges Replacement
tool_args.raw_text: On January 31, 2025, the new South Street and Fulton Avenue Bridges opened in Mt. Vernon, NY. Opening these two bridges marks the completion of an MTA Construction & Development project awarded in January 2023 to replace the superstructures and rehabilitate the substructures of the two vehicular bridges that cross over Metro-North's New Haven Line tracks.

payload.project_name: South Street and Fulton Avenue Bridges
payload.description: Replacement of South Street and Fulton Avenue Bridges over Metro-North New Haven Line in Mt. Vernon, NY. Awarded January 2023, completed ahead of May 2025 schedule.

warnings: project.implementing_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Implementing agency is relation context. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: Metro-North Security Systems Replacement
tool_args.raw_text: This month, MTA Construction & Development has completed drawings and specifications of the replacement of security systems throughout Grand Central Terminal, the Grand Central Train Shed, and the Park Avenue Tunnel. This design-bid-build project is still in procurement.

payload.project_name: Bringing Metro-North's Security Systems into State of Good Repair
payload.description: Replacement of security systems throughout Grand Central Terminal, the Grand Central Train Shed, and the Park Avenue Tunnel. Design-bid-build project.
payload.location: Grand Central Terminal, Grand Central Train Shed, Park Avenue Tunnel

location_normalized.raw_text: Grand Central Terminal, Grand Central Train Shed, Park Avenue Tunnel

tool_args.label: Mastic-Shirley Station Improvements
tool_args.raw_text: This month, MTA Construction & Development and LIRR are wrapping up station improvements at Mastic-Shirley Station located in Suffolk County on the LIRR Montauk Branch.

payload.description: Station improvements at Mastic-Shirley Station on the LIRR Montauk Branch including new station shelter, 2,000-square-foot plaza, ADA ramp repairs, LED lighting, security cameras, bike rack.
payload.location: Mastic-Shirley Station, Suffolk County, Montauk Branch

tool_args.raw_text: On January 31, 2025, the new South Street and Fulton Avenue Bridges opened in Mt. Vernon, NY.

payload.description: New South Street and Fulton Avenue Bridges opened in Mt. Vernon, NY over Metro-North New Haven Line tracks.

tool_args.label: Grand Central Madison 2nd Anniversary
tool_args.raw_text: we've already reached the 2nd anniversary of full service to Grand Central Madison, which debuted on February 27, 2023.

payload.description: 2nd anniversary of full service to Grand Central Madison, which debuted on February 27, 2023.

tool_args.label: Convo Access ASL Pilot Launch
tool_args.raw_text: The program was launched back on Monday, February 10th and seven of our stations are participating in the pilot - Penn Station, GCM, Moynihan Train Hall, Atlantic Terminal, Jamaica, Ronkonkoma, and Babylon.

payload.description: Launch of Convo Access on-demand remote video ASL interpreting service pilot at seven LIRR stations.

tool_args.label: One-millionth LIRR customer to UBS Arena
tool_args.raw_text: On January 28th, I joined UBS Arena officials and New York Islanders legend Butch Goring to celebrate the one-millionth Long Island Rail Road customer to take the train to or from a UBS Arena event.

payload.description: Celebration of one-millionth Long Island Rail Road customer to take the train to or from a UBS Arena event.

tool_args.label: Grand Central Terminal 112th Anniversary
tool_args.raw_text: This month, we proudly celebrated Grand Central Terminal's (GCT) 112 th anniversary, marking more than a century of service as a historic landmark, transportation hub, and cultural destination. Since opening on February 2, 1913

payload.description: Grand Central Terminal's 112th anniversary, marking more than a century of service since opening on February 2, 1913.

tool_args.label: Metro-North New Schedule March 30
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North will implement a new schedule starting March 30, designed to support major Construction & Development, Connecticut DOT, and Maintenance of Way projects that require track outages.

payload.description: Metro-North will implement a new schedule starting March 30, designed to support major Construction & Development, Connecticut DOT, and Maintenance of Way projects.

tool_args.label: Convo Access ASL Interpreting Pilot
tool_args.raw_text: The Long Island Rail Road joins its fellow MTA agencies in doing everything it can to make public transportation not only accessible to all but convenient for all. As such, we will be taking part in a year-long pilot of an exciting new program which uses an app to facilitate an on-demand remote video American Sign Language (ASL) interpreting service.

payload.description: Year-long pilot of on-demand remote video American Sign Language (ASL) interpreting service using an app at seven LIRR stations.
